zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjorie Ogilvie於1532年出生在蘇格蘭班福爾時，她的父親Sir Walter Ogilvy 1st Laird of Dunlugus37歲，母親Alison Home Logan Ogilvy Lady32歲。她於1555年10月24日與James Dunbar 2nd of Tarbat結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1601年6月27日在英國蘇格蘭班福爾享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjorie Ogilvie于1532年出生在苏格兰班福爾时，她的父亲Sir Walter Ogilvy 1st Laird of Dunlugus37岁，母亲Alison Home Logan Ogilvy Lady32岁。她于1555年10月24日与James Dunbar 2nd of Tarbat结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1601年6月27日在英国苏格兰班福爾享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ogilvie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Oglesby  , a habitational name from the barony of Ogilvie in Glamis (Angus), whose name is probably Pictish, of uncertain origin and meaning.

variants.name: Oglesby
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from the barony of Ogilvie in Glamis, Angus, whose name is probably Pictish, of uncertain origin and meaning.

History: A Scottish family of this name descend from Gilibride, Earl of Angus (died c. 1187), whose son Gilbert was granted the lands of Ogguluin (Ogilvie) in the late 12th century. Ogilvie was also the name of a barony in Banffshire, but that took its name from the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjorie Ogilvie was born in 1532, in Banffshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Walter Ogilvy 1st Laird of Dunlugus, was 37 and her mother, Alison Home Logan Ogilvy Lady, was 32. She married James Dunbar 2nd of Tarbat on 24 October 1555. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 27 June 1601, in Banffshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjorie Ogilvie est née en 1532, à Banffshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Walter Ogilvy 1st Laird of Dunlugus, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Alison Home Logan Ogilvy Lady, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé James Dunbar 2nd of Tarbat le 24 octobre 1555. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 27 juin 1601, à Banffshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Marjorie Ogilvie(이)가 1532년 스컷랜드 반프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Walter Ogilvy 1st Laird of Dunlugus(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alison Home Logan Ogilvy Lady(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1555년 10월 24일 James Dunbar 2nd of Tarbat(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1601년 6월 27일 영국 스코틀랜드 반프실르에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjorie Ogilvie родилась в 1532 г. в местности банффшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Walter Ogilvy 1st Laird of Dunlugus было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alison Home Logan Ogilvy Lady, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Dunbar 2nd of Tarbat 24 октября 1555 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 27 июня 1601 г. в местности банффшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.
